title: Trump Says 2nd Round of U.S.-Iran Talks Could Take Place This Week
summary_full: The president did not say who would represent the United States in a potential next round of direct talks, though he ruled out being personally involved.
summary_public: The president did not say who would represent the United States in a potential next round of direct talks, though he ruled out being personally involved.
